title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 81.160 - Enactment of ordinances — additional power (cities of 10,000 to 30,000)
text:
81.160.  Enactment of ordinances — additional power (cities of 10,000 to 30,000). — All cities within this state having more than ten thousand and less than thirty thousand inhabitants, and having a special charter, in their corporate capacity are authorized and empowered to enact ordinances for the following purposes, in addition to the powers now conferred upon such cities by law.
(RSMo 1939 § 7480) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7327; 1919 § 8741
